name: belfr-extension
description: Auto-switch Belgian websites from Dutch to French

scripts.build: powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path manifest.json, background.js, popup.html, popup.js, icons -DestinationPath belfr-extension.zip -Force"
scripts.build:bash: zip -r belfr-extension.zip manifest.json background.js popup.html popup.js icons/
